subcodes.title: Address at Theosophical Society of Edinburgh, 1913-01-09
subcodes.first_line: It gives me great pleasure to be with you this evening and to take part in your delightful gathering, for you Theosophists, Praise be to God, are always independent investigators
subcodes.first_line_orig: امشب چون در مجلس شما هستم بسیار مسرورم زیرا شما الحمد لله تحری حقیقت می نمااید
subcodes.subjects: @relationship of the soul to the body, @proofs for the existence; immortality of the soul, @passage of elementary matter through degrees of existence, @elementary matter cannot be annihilated, @progress only takes place within its own degree, @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being
